EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISelectionSet3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that manage a set of selected table rows or features using globalid.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("97A3EEBC-EE8A-4274-AEF1-8A40FEB8B686")]
public interface ISelectionSet3 : ISelectionSet2, ISelectionSet

GlobalIDs

Returns the globalids in the selection set.

string[] GlobalIDs { get; }
